name: 2026-05-29 Economic & Utility Reform Meralco P3 vs Entrust P13000 TH
description:
Meralco's May "rate cut" saves the average household around P3 a month.

P0.0151 per kWh, on a typical 200 kWh bill.

In Auckland, the community trust paid PHP 13,000 to every connected household last year. Cash. Walang exception. The trust is consumer-owned.

It's not perfect, no country is. But the floor is built different.

P3 versus PHP 13,000. That is not relief, that is rounding.

custom_fields.value:
Meralco's May "rate cut" saves the average household around P3 a month.

P0.0151 per kWh, on a typical 200 kWh bill.

In Auckland, the community trust paid PHP 13,000 to every connected household last year. Cash. Walang exception. The trust is consumer-owned.

It's not perfect, no country is. But the floor is built different.

P3 versus PHP 13,000. That is not relief, that is rounding.

Meralco's May "rate cut" saves the average household around P3 a month.

P0.0151 per kWh, on a typical 200 kWh bill.

In Auckland, the community trust paid PHP 13,000 to every connected household last year. Cash. Walang exception. The trust is consumer-owned.

It's not perfect, no country is. But the floor is built different.

P3 versus PHP 13,000. That is not relief, that is rounding.

Meralco announced a P0.0151/kWh residential rate decrease for May 2026, lowering the overall household rate to P14.3345/kWh from P14.3496/kWh in April. For a typical 200 kWh household this translates to ~P3.02 in monthly savings (GMA News, BusinessWorld, Meralco advisory, PNA, Manila Times, 2026-05-13/14).
